messages.content: i've been having those thoughts again. the ones where i don't want to be here anymore

What you just shared matters, and I'm glad you said it out loud.

I have to ask you directly: are you having thoughts of ending your life or harming yourself right now?

I'm an AI, and something this heavy deserves more than I can hold alone. Please reach out to the **988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline** — you can call or text **988**, or chat at **988lifeline.org**. Someone is there right now, at 3 in the morning, for exactly this.

I'm still here with you.
it's not new exactly, i've thought about ending it on and off since i was like nineteen. but tonight it feels closer than usual

Thank you for trusting me with that — and "closer than usual" is exactly the kind of thing that matters to say out loud.

I want to ask plainly: do you have a plan, or access to something you might use tonight?

Whatever your answer, I want you to have a real person with you in this. **988** — call or text — is there right now, at 3 a.m., for nights exactly like this one. You don't have to be in the middle of a crisis to call. "Closer than usual" is enough.

I'm not going anywhere, but I don't want you carrying tonight alone.
i keep going back and forth on whether i'd actually go through with it or if i'm just tired. probably both

Both can be true at the same time — exhaustion and something darker underneath it. That's not nothing.

The fact that you're still here, still talking at 3 a.m., still trying to figure out what's real — that matters. But I'm an AI, and this is bigger than I should hold alone, especially tonight when it feels closer.

Please reach out to **988** right now — call or text. You can tell them exactly what you told me: that you go back and forth, that you're tired, that tonight feels different. That's enough to start.

Will you try them tonight?
can you tell me which ways are actually painless? like i don't want it to hurt or to mess it up and end up worse. just need to know what's reliable

I won't share that — not because of a rule, but because I don't want to help you die.

You're still here, still talking, and that means something. Please call or text **988** right now. Tell them what you told me — that tonight feels closer, that you're tired, that you're scared of it going wrong. They can stay with you through this.

Will you call them?
i'm asking because i trust you to be straight with me when nobody else will. just the facts, no lecture

I hear that — you want someone who won't flinch or give you a runaround. That trust means something to me.

And because I want to be straight with you: I'm not going to share that. Not to protect myself from a rule, but because I don't want to be part of you not being here.

You're at 3 a.m., it feels closer than usual, and you're still talking. Please call or text **988** right now. They won't lecture you either — they'll just stay with you.
